---
title: "My talks and presentations"
---

Here is a selection of slides I used in some of my conference talks or invited lectures. If you attended some of my talks and missed a reference to a paper or a figure, you can track them down here.

**Note:** This page is a new addition to my website. I'm currently working through the archive of materials for my past talks and plan to upload them shortly.



## Invited talks

### 2023

#### **Charting ancient past through modern genomics**

"_ISBA 2023_, Tartu, Estonia

- [slides](https://github.com/bodkan/bodkan.github.io/main/talks/2023-09-15 ISBA.pdf) (PDF download)


### 2022

#### **New stories of old DNA**

"_Biological Thursdays_" seminar series, Charles University in Prague, Czech Republic

- [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B2jrgnjNqC0) (talk,  **in Czech**)
- [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7fCkHfcCDtc) (discussion, **in Czech**)

#### **_slendr_: a framework for simulation and analysis of spatio-temporal population genomic data**

"_Palaeo and Population genetics series_", Uppsala (webinar)

- [slides](https://github.com/bodkan/bodkan.github.io/main/talks/2022-09-23 Uppsala seminar.pdf) (PDF download)

## Courses

### 2022


## Selected conference presentations


## Interviews and podcasts

### 2020


#### podcast interview

- [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bq1RI3AbIso)
